name: Struffoli (Honey Balls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the eggs, butter, and 1 teaspoon sugar until foamy.
2. Gradually add baking powder and flour to the mixture. Work it into a soft dough with your hands.
3. Divide the dough into four pieces. On a floured surface, roll each piece into a rope about the width of your index finger and 12 inches long.
4. Cut the ropes into 1-inch pieces. Toss the pieces lightly with enough flour to dust them, then shake off excess flour.
5. Heat oil to 375°F in a deep fryer.
6. Fry the struffoli a few handfuls at a time until they puff up and are golden brown. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a paper towel to drain.
7. In a large saucepan over low heat, combine the honey and 1/2 cup sugar. Stir until the sugar has dissolved and keep warm over low heat.
8. Add the fried balls, a few at a time, and turn with a wooden spoon to coat on all sides.
9. Transfer the balls to a large platter and mound them into a pyramid, shaping with wet hands.
10. Sprinkle with colored sprinkles and let stand for 1 to 2 hours. Then break off pieces with your hands to eat.
